message:
feat(parity): unify terminal/WASM tick semantics and add pane interaction determinism gate

Eliminate all cfg(target_arch = "wasm32") branching in the app tick/update/
subscription lifecycle so terminal and web runtimes follow identical code paths:

- app.rs: remove target-conditional branches in init(), update(), From<Event>,
  and subscriptions() — both targets now use Cmd::Tick-based tick scheduling
  and return empty subscriptions (the old Every-based terminal path is removed)
- simulator.rs: expose pool() accessor on ProgramSimulator for parity test
  frame rendering

Add determinism and parity CI gates:
- ftui-showcase-wasm: add pane_interaction_trace_is_deterministic test that
  exercises pointer down/move/up, intelligence mode, undo/redo/replay, snapshot
  export/import and asserts stable layout hashes, selected IDs, operation IDs,
  and baseline IDs across two identical runs
- ftui-demo-showcase: add terminal_web_parity.rs test (new untracked file)
- ci.yml: add terminal/web parity gate and pane interaction parity gate steps

Fix shell quoting in check_pane_traceability.sh:
- Replace escaped jq string quotes with proper unescaped double quotes inside
  single-quoted heredocs (fixes broken JSON construction)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -481,6 +481,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Golden checksum verification (bd-3jlw5.2)
         run: cargo test -p ftui-demo-showcase --test golden_checksums -- golden_checksums_verify golden_checksums_deterministic --nocapture
 
+      - name: Terminal/Web parity gate (all screens + interactions)
+        run: cargo test -p ftui-demo-showcase --test terminal_web_parity -- --nocapture
+
+      - name: Pane interaction parity gate
+        run: cargo test -p ftui-showcase-wasm pane_interaction_trace_is_deterministic -- --nocapture
+
       - name: Baseline benchmark capture (bd-3jlw5.1)
         run: cargo test -p ftui-demo-showcase --test baseline_capture -- --nocapture

@@ -221,10 +221,10 @@ while IFS= read -r issue; do
         while IFS= read -r evidence_key; do
             evidence_value="$(jq -r --arg key "$evidence_key" '.[$key] // empty' <<< "$evidence_status_json")"
             if [[ "$issue_status" == "closed" && "$evidence_value" != "passing" ]]; then
-                stale_rows+=("$(jq -cn --arg bead_id "$bead_id" --arg key "$evidence_key" --arg value "$evidence_value" --arg issue_status "$issue_status" '{bead_id:$bead_id,issue_status:$issue_status,evidence:$key,status:$value,reason:\"closed bead requires passing evidence\"}')")
+                stale_rows+=("$(jq -cn --arg bead_id "$bead_id" --arg key "$evidence_key" --arg value "$evidence_value" --arg issue_status "$issue_status" '{bead_id:$bead_id,issue_status:$issue_status,evidence:$key,status:$value,reason:"closed bead requires passing evidence"}')")
             fi
             if [[ "$issue_status" == "in_progress" && ( "$evidence_value" == "planned" || "$evidence_value" == "blocked" ) ]]; then
-                stale_rows+=("$(jq -cn --arg bead_id "$bead_id" --arg key "$evidence_key" --arg value "$evidence_value" --arg issue_status "$issue_status" '{bead_id:$bead_id,issue_status:$issue_status,evidence:$key,status:$value,reason:\"in-progress bead has non-actionable required evidence\"}')")
+                stale_rows+=("$(jq -cn --arg bead_id "$bead_id" --arg key "$evidence_key" --arg value "$evidence_value" --arg issue_status "$issue_status" '{bead_id:$bead_id,issue_status:$issue_status,evidence:$key,status:$value,reason:"in-progress bead has non-actionable required evidence"}')")
             fi
         done < <(jq -r '.[]' <<< "$required_evidence_json")
     fi
